{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Suriel's ghost
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] has a pet ghost that looks like a doll made of gray smoke and speaks with an all-surrounding neutral voice.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
